name: Anise Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 Tbsp Egg Beaters® 99% Egg Substitute Note
recipeInstructions:
NOTE: Original recipe used butter
NOTE: Original recipe used 2 large eggs
Preheat the oven to 400°F and lightly spray two cookie sheets. In a medium bowl, cream together the margarine and sugar. Add the egg beaters and vanilla extract, then mix thoroughly.
In another bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, salt, and anise seeds. Mix the dry ingredients into the wet mixture. Using a teaspoon, drop dough onto the prepared cookie sheets and bake for 5-7 minutes, or until golden brown. Makes 36 cookies.
